answers.10_continue_rose_stop: Continue VOID only as a narrow engineering candidate with R1-only row0 smoke or Q1/Q2 ablation; in parallel, ROSE can be resumed if third-model search must continue. Do not run long VOID training.
answers.1_was_exp50_negative_loser_dominant: Yes. Exp51 forensic confirmed margin growth was dominated by the loser branch: final winner_gap was small while loser_gap was much more negative, so vanilla DPO improved the objective mainly by degrading the loser.
answers.2_did_winner_preserving_fix: Not proven. Recipes were preregistered, but the R1-R4 one-step grid blocked before checkpoint/video evidence.
answers.3_did_local_only_help: Not evaluated; R1 LocalDPO blocked before checkpoint.
answers.4_did_linear_dpo_help: Not evaluated; R4 blocked before checkpoint.
answers.5_did_sdpo_safe_help: Not evaluated; R3 blocked before checkpoint.
answers.6_is_proj_out_sufficient: Still inconclusive. Exp50 proj_out passed zero-gap and one-step, but vanilla 10-step was negative and Exp51 rescue grid did not complete.
answers.7_is_vor_quadmask_blocker: Suspected but not proven. Quadmask audit showed local object/affected/boundary damage and Q3 broad affected spill on REAL rows; Q1/Q2 are better diagnostics.
answers.8_did_void_native_kubric_help: Blocked. Missing Kubric/PyBullet/Blender/HUMOTO assets prevented native data generation.
answers.9_is_void_third_adapter_evidence: No. VOID is not third adapter evidence.

fetch_note: Milestone J start attempted git fetch on H20 but hit transient GnuTLS recv error; previous push had remote/local HEAD verified and final push uses bundle relay.
